content.p1: Frontend developer focused on building web apps with Angular. I like clean component structure, reusable UI, and simple state management.
content.p2: I have worked on responsive layouts, forms, and interactive UI features (filtering, sorting, commenting). I have basic experience with PrimeNG and Angular Material. I also have basic backend knowledge (NestJS), which helps me better understand how applications work.
content.p3: Now I am improving my Angular skills, especially modern features like Signals and standalone components.
content.p4: My goal is to keep learning and build stable, maintainable frontend apps.

projects.p: Selection of frontend projects I made.

contact.p: If I’ve sparked your interest or you have any questions, feel free to send me a message!
